title: Project Tagging on Transactions
description: The system shall allow the user to optionally tag any transaction with a pre-configured Project. The project_id field on TransactionEntity is nullable; untagged transactions are valid. The timeline shall support filtering by project.
acceptance_criteria: Project picker appears as an optional field in the transaction entry screen
A transaction can be saved with project_id = null (no project)
Filtering the timeline by a project shows all transactions tagged to it, regardless of category
Transactions tagged to a project remain correctly linked after the project is edited
